 "terminatedAsset": {{user_bien_resilie.text}},
 "terminatedCompany": {{user_compagnie_a_resilier.selectedOptionLabel}},
 "address1": {{user_adress1.text}},
 "address2": {{user_adress2.text}},
 "address3": {{user_adress3.text}},

 "contractTypeText": {{MySendingBoxType.data["0"]["Type de contrat text"]}},
 "sendingDate":
